title: DA12 2QF, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/QP3337QC/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited Installation name: Gravesend Sludge Treatment Centre and Gravesend Wastewater Treatment Works Permit number: EPR/QP3337QC/V002  "
